title: Built a tool to develop high-performing indicator-based trading strategies
author: Renov_J
selftext:
Hello.



I've created a tool to help develop high-performing indicator-based trading strategies.

I'm curious to see if it can be truly helpful not only for myself but also for others.



This applies to anyone interested in exploring indicator-based trading strategies.

Even if you have a trading strategy idea, the process of developing it into a truly useful strategy is not easy.

The core idea is to use AI to analyze how a strategy can be improved to be more effective and suggest specific improvement suggestions.

This allows users to more easily and quickly find the optimal strategy for a specific target regime or market situation (chart).



I'm currently looking for alpha testers.

Leave a comment if you are interested and I'll send you a DM with the application link!

comments.author: Renov_J
comments.body: Build a tool (X) -> Created a platform that helps design and test indicator-based trading strategies. (O)
